name: Yellow.ai Conversational AI Platform API
what_it_does: Enterprise conversational AI platform with REST API — building and deploying AI-powered customer service and employee virtual assistants across 35+ channels (WhatsApp, Instagram, web, voice, email), with dynamic AI agents that handle complex conversations, multilingual support for 100+ languages, and deep CRM and contact center integrations.
use_cases: Deploying AI-powered customer service bots across WhatsApp, Instagram, and web via Yellow.ai
Integrating Yellow.ai conversation data with CRM for customer journey analytics
Building voice bots for IVR automation with Yellow.ai's voice AI capabilities
Managing bot flows, intents, and responses via Yellow.ai REST API
Querying conversation analytics and CSAT metrics for AI performance reporting
not_for: Simple FAQ chatbots (use Tidio or Freshdesk for simple bots)
Pure contact center workforce management (use NICE or Verint for WFM)
SMBs without omnichannel customer engagement at scale
best_when: An enterprise in Asia-Pacific, Middle East, or emerging markets needs omnichannel conversational AI across WhatsApp, regional messaging apps, and voice — with strong multilingual NLP for non-English languages.
avoid_when: You're primarily a North American or European market company with established Cognigy/Kore.ai deployments, or need simple single-channel chatbots.

auth.notes: API key from Yellow.ai dashboard. OAuth2 for CRM integrations. Bearer token auth. Bot-scoped access. Webhook for conversation events, CSAT surveys, and escalations. 35+ channel integrations (WhatsApp Business API, Instagram, Facebook, LINE, KakaoTalk). Voice AI via telephony integration. No fine-grained scopes.

pricing.notes: Indian company (Bengaluru). Founded 2016. Raised $102M Series C (2021). Backed by WestBridge Capital, Sapphire Ventures. Decacorn potential in conversational AI. Strong in India, Southeast Asia, Middle East markets. 1,000+ enterprise customers including Domino's, Hyundai, Hulu, Edelweiss. DynamicNLP engine for multilingual conversations. 100+ language support with regional language strength. WhatsApp Commerce integration for transactional bots.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for bots, conversations, analytics, and channel management. API key and OAuth2 auth. Good documentation. WhatsApp Business API requires Meta Business verification. Voice AI requires telephony partner setup. DynamicNLP concept requires platform knowledge. SDK for Node.js and Python.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Analytics reads idempotent. Conversation reads idempotent. Bot flow updates use versioning — validate version IDs.
known_agent_gotchas: WhatsApp Business API requires Meta Business Manager verification before deployment
Regional language NLP quality varies — test extensively for target languages
Voice AI requires separate telephony partner integration and SIP configuration
India and APAC focus — US/EU enterprise support may be slower response time
WhatsApp message templates require Meta pre-approval (24-48 hours turnaround)

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR compliant. Multi-region data residency including India and UAE. API key and OAuth2 auth. WhatsApp conversation data contains PII — Meta data processing agreement required in addition to Yellow.ai DPA. Customer conversation data jurisdiction varies by region — validate data residency for each deployment region.
